class.name: EditorToast
class.brief_description: Alert notification that is displayed in the Editor.
class.description: Used in conjunction with [EditorToaster], this class represents an individual toast notification that can be displayed within the editor.

method.name: add_action
close
method.description: Closes the toast notification. If [param instant] is [code]false[/code], the toast disappears with a fade-out effect.

method.name: copy
method.description: Copies the toast's message to the clipboard.

method.name: get_message
method.description: Returns the message displayed in the toast notification.

method.name: get_severity
method.description: Returns the severity level of the toast notification.
